creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
chars being inputted can interrupt uboot or loader while booting, they both can drop to to their command line and boot ia stuck forever

also, the probably most cursed bug i observed when i decided to reboot loop my board, i was on physical console at a time. cu was running on ttyv1, i was in ttyv2, and i had to kill cu as commands were constantly injected to my prompt from another terminal. unsure if i ran vt or sc at a time then

also, in my case, crap gets injected when i run cu. at that moment fake input appears. time confirms it

as i felt like kernel corrupts in general due this, i was suggested to run kasan kernel to see what actually happens

earlier i also got, again, this, after which i decided i'll make the bug appear:

Want to go the directory you were just in?
Type "cd -"

00:54,root@green:~# cu -s 115200 -l /dev/cuaU1
